labels: 'security, critical'

## ⚠️ 重要提示 | IMPORTANT NOTICE

**⚠️ 请勿在公开 Issue 中报告安全漏洞！**
**⚠️ DO NOT report security vulnerabilities in public issues!**

**对于严重的安全问题，请使用以下私密渠道：**
**For critical security issues, please use these private channels:**

- 📧 **Email**: [security@yyc3.com](mailto:security@yyc3.com)
- 🔐 **GitHub Security Advisories**: [提交私有报告](https://github.com/YYC-Cube/YYC3-Financial-Dashboard/security/advisories/new)

---

## 🔒 安全问题描述 | Security Issue Description

**清晰描述发现的安全问题。**
**Clearly describe the security issue discovered.**

> **注意**: 仅限非关键安全问题可在此处讨论。关键漏洞请使用上述私密渠道。
> **Note**: Only non-critical security issues should be discussed here. For critical vulnerabilities, use the private channels above.

---

## 🎯 影响范围 | Scope of Impact

**此安全问题可能影响哪些方面？**
**What aspects might this security issue affect?**

- [ ] 💰 **用户数据 User Data** - 用户个人信息、财务数据等
- [ ] 🔑 **认证授权 Authentication/Authorization** - 登录、权限控制等
- [ ] 🌐 **网络通信 Network Communication** - API 调用、数据传输等
- [ ] 💻 **客户端安全 Client-Side Security** - XSS、CSRF 等
- [ ] 🗄️ **服务器端安全 Server-Side Security** - SQL注入、命令注入等
- [ ] 📦 **依赖安全 Dependency Security** - 第三方库漏洞等

---

## 🔍 复现步骤 | Steps to Reproduce

**如何复现此安全问题？**
**How to reproduce this security issue?**

1. ...
2. ...

---

## ✅ 修复建议 | Suggested Fix

**如果你有修复建议，请在此说明。**
**If you have suggestions for fixing this, please describe here.**

---

## 📊 严重等级评估 | Severity Assessment

请评估此问题的严重程度 | Please assess the severity of this issue:

| 等级 Level | 描述 Description | 选择 Select |
|-----------|------------------|------------|
| 🔴 **Critical** | 可直接导致数据泄露、系统被入侵 | [ ] |
| 🟠 **High** | 可能导致敏感信息泄露或权限提升 | [ ] |
| 🟡 **Medium** | 存在安全隐患但利用难度较高 | [ ] |
| 🟢 **Low** | 安全最佳实践建议，无直接风险 | [ ] |

---

**其他相关信息。**
**Any other relevant information.**
